citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Both supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms find patterns in data. Supervised learning uses features to predict the class label supplied by a teacher; unsupervised learning groups similar instances together, creating its own classes. Reinforcement learning uses trial and error to find a policy for choosing actions that maximizes the reinforcement signal.
